meta.title: Book Directly - Farm El Baya
meta.description: Send a direct booking request for Farm El Baya in Testour. No platform fees, no middleman, better direct rates.

hero.heading: Book your stay directly.
hero.subhead: No platform fees. No middleman. Just you, the farm, and a better rate.

form.success: Your request has been sent. Mahdi will be in touch via WhatsApp or email within 24 hours. We look forward to welcoming you.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please email us directly at contact@farmelbaya.com
form.payment: Payment is settled on arrival. Tunisian guests may pay by cash or bank transfer. International guests may pay by card - Stripe payment link coming soon.
form.deposit: A 30% deposit may be required during peak season to confirm your reservation.
